title: kryeit Amethyst
description: This is a branch of Mornic's kryeit gold removing some of the advanced features and adding a lot of aesthetics and qol mods so that you dont need to run shaders for MineCraft to look good. (THIS IS A CREATE 1.5 MODPACK FOR THE KRYEIT SERVER)
body:
This is a alternate modpack muri's kryeit modpack. This modpack is for those who do not think shaders are the best but still want asthetics or people without a good graphics card but still want something. This adds some QOL mods like auto swapping your elytra with your chestplate or being able to search through containers youve opened. Some of the asthetic mods conist of better rain and snow, 3d splashes, and  better inventory animations. This is not a modpack that makes minecraft super overtextured, it keeps it vanallia but with better visuals. If any problems arise contact me in discord @seamonstermus_09860. Also i am very open to suggestions, but client mods only. 
Added mods in addition to kryeit:
- ETF & EMF(for fresh moves and fresh animations)
- Essential
- FLight assistant with do a barrel roll
- immersive ui
- wakes
- cool rain
- particle rain and particular
- not enough animations
- 3d skin layers and 3d armor
- better f3
- distant horizons
- container searcher

PS: Thank you Muri for making the kryeit server for us this has been a wonderful experience.
